prestazioni: Replace the stock 3.0L VR30DDTT twin-turbo V6 (engine code: VR30DDTT) with a fully built internals package featuring forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance to handle 1,000+ HP targets. Pair with a custom turbo setup using twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (84mm inducer, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) on a Tomei 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold with divorced wastegates for optimized spool and top-end power.

Upgrade the fuel system with dual Bosch Motorsports 044 high-flow fuel pumps, ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual catch-can system to manage crankcase pressure under extreme boost (35+ psi). Integrate a Motec M150 ECU with a custom VR30DDTT-specific calibration map for precise ignition timing and lambda control, paired with a Plex Knock Monitor for real-time detonation detection.

Install a custom 4WD drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential in the front and a Wavetrac limited-slip differential in the rear, mated to a Tilton triple-disc carbon clutch and a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox (6-speed, paddle-shift actuated) with a 3.91 final drive ratio for brutal acceleration. Suspension is overhauled with Öhlins TTX46 coilovers (3-way adjustable, 24-position rebound/compression damping) and spherical bearing control arms from SuperPro for zero compliance under lateral loads.
estetica: Apply a full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Q80-specific, carbon fiber construction) with extended fenders (50mm front, 70mm rear) to accommodate the 20x12-inch front and 21x13-inch rear Work Meister S1 3P wheels (ET15 front, ET5 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 front, 325/25 rear). The kit includes a custom front splitter with integrated canards and a massive GT-style rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,800mm span) for 1,200kg of downforce at 200 km/h.

Replace all exterior lighting with a full LED conversion from LUX Automotive, featuring sequential turn signals, adaptive matrix headlights with laser high-beams, and a custom RGB underglow system (Philips Hue+ controlled) integrated into the rocker panels and diffuser. The body is wrapped in Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film (Matte Obsidian Black) with a 3M Scotchprint Wrap Overlaminate for UV protection and a satin finish.

Interior is stripped and rebuilt with a full carbon fiber monocoque from V Carbon, featuring Recaro SPG XL seats (Kevlar/carbon hybrid, 6-point Schroth harnesses), a custom roll cage (TIG-welded chromoly, 4-point harness bar) from Custom Cages, and a digital dash cluster from AIM MXS Strada (12-inch, configurable shift lights, lap timer). The steering wheel is a Momo Prototipo (suede, 350mm diameter) with integrated Motec PDM30 power distribution module controls.
